ItacPersonItem.Notes: Founder of the Accademia dei Ricovrati. See Laura Megna, `Federico Cornaro e l`Accademia padovana dei Ricovrati`, in Studi Veneziani, 43 (2002), pp. 331-48. His biography by G. Gullino in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
